shorts.title: What's REALLY in NyQuil? 💊 3 pills, 12 cents
shorts.description:
NyQuil is just 3 generic pills: Tylenol + Robitussin + Benadryl.

A box of NyQuil: $12-15
The same 3 generics: about 12 cents

shorts.description:

A box of Tylenol PM: $11

shorts.title: What's REALLY in Mucinex DM? 💊 2 pills, 15 cents
shorts.description:
Mucinex DM is just 2 generic ingredients: Mucinex (guaifenesin) + Robitussin (DXM).

A box of Mucinex DM: $15-20
The same 2 generics: about 15 cents
That "extended-release" tablet? Same active ingredient.

shorts.title: What's REALLY in Advil PM? 💊 2 pills, 5 cents
shorts.description:
Advil PM is just 2 generic pills: regular Advil + Benadryl. They literally just put them together.

A box of Advil PM: $10-12
The same 2 generics: about 5 cents
You're paying for the word "PM" on the label.

shorts.title: What's REALLY in DayQuil? 💊 3 pills, 10 cents
shorts.description:
DayQuil is just 3 generic pills: Tylenol + Sudafed PE + Robitussin. Identical to NyQuil minus the sleep aid.

A box of DayQuil: $12-15
The same 3 generics: about 10 cents
Same drugs. Same doses. Different price tag.

shorts.title: What's REALLY in Theraflu? 💊 Fancy? Not really.
shorts.description:
Theraflu is just 3 generic pills dissolved in hot water: Tylenol + Benadryl + Sudafed PE.

$10-12 for the powder packets
About 8 cents if you just swallow 3 generic pills
The hot water is free.
